project.name: Octagon Oracle
project.description: MMA analytics & training platform — Final Year Project (FYP)
project.purpose: Multi-role system for UFC fighters, coaches, beginners, and fans. Core features: ML fight prediction (custom ensemble model 70.7% accuracy), coach-fighter relationship management, fight camp tracking, weight cut monitoring, AI opponent scouting via Groq LLM.

step_1_mongodb.note: MongoDB is NOT a Windows service — must be started manually each session

CRITICAL_STARTUP_SEQUENCE.combined_start: From D:\octagonNEW\Octagon root: npm run dev (uses concurrently to start both)

frontend.styling: Tailwind CSS v4 — CRITICAL: uses @theme directive in app/globals.css, NOT tailwind.config.ts. NEVER create tailwind.config.ts.
frontend.charts: Recharts (used on weight-cut, comparison, events; NOT used on prediction — replaced with custom Framer Motion bars)

backend.database: MongoDB 8.0.6 with Mongoose 8 — local instance at mongodb://localhost:27017/octagon-oracle
backend.ai: Groq API — model: llama-3.3-70b-versatile — key in backend/.env
backend.auth: JWT — Bearer token in Authorization header

ml_model.type: Custom Ensemble: Logistic Regression + Gradient Boosted Trees
ml_model.note: Model is already trained and loaded at startup. NEVER re-train unless explicitly asked.

critical_patterns.api_helper: Use apiRequest<T>() from frontend/lib/api.ts for ALL frontend API calls. Response shape: { success, data?, message?, pagination? }
critical_patterns.auth_token: getAuthToken() from @/contexts/AuthContext — call inside useEffect or event handlers ONLY, never at module level
critical_patterns.useAuth_hook: const { user, isAuthenticated, isLoading, token, logout, refreshUser } = useAuth()
critical_patterns.protected_routes: All protected backend routes use: import { protect } from '../middleware/auth' — add as middleware
critical_patterns.activity_logging: Use logActivity() from backend/src/utils/activityLogger.ts — wraps in try/catch, NEVER throws
critical_patterns.tailwind_v4_warning: NEVER add tailwind.config.ts. Custom colors like octagon-red defined in globals.css @theme {} block.
critical_patterns.typescript_es2022: Backend tsconfig targets ES2022 — avoid ES2023 features like findLast(). Use .filter().pop() instead.
critical_patterns.stale_closure_fix: Always extract res.data to a local const BEFORE async callbacks to avoid stale closure bugs
critical_patterns.page_client_directive: All Next.js App Router pages that use hooks MUST have 'use client' at top
critical_patterns.imports_prefix: Frontend imports use @/ mapped to frontend/ root (e.g., @/lib/api, @/contexts/AuthContext)
critical_patterns.suspense_for_searchparams: Any page using useSearchParams MUST be wrapped in <Suspense>. See opponent-dossier/page.tsx for the pattern.
critical_patterns.new_model_in_index: When adding a new Mongoose model: export it from backend/src/models/index.ts
critical_patterns.new_route_in_index: When adding new routes: import + mount in backend/src/routes/index.ts
critical_patterns.response_extraction: TypeScript: const d = res.data; then use d.field — avoids 'possibly undefined' errors

authentication.profile_update: PATCH /api/auth/profile — Bearer token + any profile fields

dashboard_routing.file: frontend/app/dashboard/page.tsx — reads user.role and calls router.replace()

Fighter.description: UFC celebrity fighter DB (8,424 records) — NOT User accounts. Used for prediction/comparison/scouting.

fields.coachId: ObjectId ref User (optional — pulled from active CoachRelationship on create)
fields.milestones: IMilestone[] — 10 auto-generated on create with evenly-spaced targetDates

FightCamp.IMilestone: { _id, title, targetDate, completed: false, completedAt?, notes? }

WeightLog.important: unique:true on userId — ONE document per user, entries are embedded array

fields.alertThresholdKg: Number (default: 3 — coach alerted when fighter exceeds target by this amount)
fields.entries: { date: Date, weightKg: Number, notes?: String }[]

fields.tags: String[] — from: striking | grappling | clinch | cardio | defense | ground

predictions.POST /api/predictions: Bearer + { fighter1Name, fighter2Name } → PredictionResult with topFactors[5] (each has factor, description, absContrib, direction:'positive'|'negative'), modelStats (modelType, samples, features, cvAccuracy, lastTrained), counterfactual

relationships.GET /api/relationships: Bearer → list all relationships for current user

assignments.GET /api/assignments: Bearer → list (role-aware: coach sees sent, trainee sees received)

fight_camp.POST /api/fight-camp: Bearer → create camp (auto-generates 10 milestones, sets coachId from active relationship)

weight_cut.POST /api/weight-cut/log: Bearer + { weightKg, date?, notes? } — fires coach alert activity if overTarget > alertThresholdKg
weight_cut.GET /api/weight-cut/history: Bearer → WeightLogData (entries sorted ASC for chart)

opponent_dossier.POST /api/opponent-dossier/generate: Bearer + { opponentName, fightCampId? } → { opponentStats: Fighter, gamePlan: string (Groq markdown), generatedAt }

events.POST /api/events/sync: Bearer admin → sync from external source

frontend_pages./: Landing page (public) — hero section, features, CTA
frontend_pages./dashboard: Role router — reads user.role, redirects to correct sub-dashboard
frontend_pages./dashboard/coach: Coach dashboard — stats, ConnectionHub widget, assignment overview, strategy CTA
frontend_pages./dashboard/fighter: Fighter dashboard — stats, ConnectionHub, Fight Camp countdown widget, Weight Cut strip, AI Game Plan quick action
frontend_pages./dashboard/beginner: Beginner dashboard — onboarding quiz (PATCH /auth/profile on complete), roadmap card, resources
frontend_pages./dashboard/fan: Fan dashboard — stats, quick actions, predictions CTA
frontend_pages./fight-camp: Fight camp — countdown, 10-milestone checklist (click-to-toggle), sparring journal with star ratings + tags
frontend_pages./weight-cut: Daily weight log — Recharts AreaChart with target ReferenceLine, entry history, alert banner
frontend_pages./opponent-dossier: UFC search → stat bars (Framer Motion) → AI game plan (markdown rendered). Quick-select chips. Suspense wrapper for useSearchParams.
frontend_pages./prediction: Fighter vs fighter — ?f1=&f2= URL params auto-populate. Result: probability bars, Explainable AI section (animated green/red factor bars), counterfactual amber card, Model Transparency panel (open by default).
frontend_pages./comparison: Radar chart (8 metrics), style badges (Striker/Grappler/Well-Rounded), head-to-head table
frontend_pages./events: UFC events — 3 tabs with correct counts (prefetched on mount), Predict buttons → /prediction?f1=&f2=
frontend_pages./profile: User profile — stats, recent activity (currently uses hardcoded data — Phase 3.5 target)
frontend_pages./form-check: AI form check with pose analysis

Navbar.notes: Role-aware nav links. Fighter: DASHBOARD,FIGHT CAMP,WEIGHT CUT,DOSSIER,ASSIGNMENTS,MESSAGES,TRAINING. Beginner: DASHBOARD,MY COACH,ASSIGNMENTS,MESSAGES,TRAINING,FORM CHECK,EVENTS. Coach: DASHBOARD,ROSTER,ASSIGNMENTS,MESSAGES,STRATEGY,EVENTS. Fan: DASHBOARD,PREDICTION,COMPARISON,EVENTS,TRAINING.

ConnectionHub.notes: Dashboard widget — relationship roster, pending invites, assignment preview, activity feed. Used on coach/fighter/beginner dashboards.

Chatbot.notes: Currently small 360x580px floating bubble. Has markdown rendering + role-aware chips + history. NEEDS redesign to full-height right panel (Phase 3.4).

FighterRadarChart.notes: 8-metric radar chart. Fighter A = red, Fighter B = blue. Used on /comparison.

key_exports: fightCampApi — create, getActive, listAll, updateMilestone, updateStatus, addSparring, listSparring, deleteSparring
interfaces: PredictionResult — includes topFactors[{ factor, description, absContrib, direction:'positive'|'negative' }] + modelStats + counterfactual

phase_1.name: Stakeholder Connection Layer
what_was_built: CoachRelationship model — invite by email, accept/decline/end, status tracking
Assignment model + CRUD — type/status/submission/feedback flow
Conversation + Message models — dedup via participantKey, unread tracking
ActivityLog model + logActivity() utility
Controllers + routes: relationships, assignments, messages, activity
Frontend: /connections, /assignments, /messages pages
ConnectionHub dashboard widget
Navbar updated with role-specific links for all 4 roles

phase_2.name: Fighter Fight Camp Suite
what_was_built: FightCamp model — opponent, fight date, weight class, 10 auto-generated milestones
WeightLog model — per-user daily weigh-in log (unique per userId), target, alert threshold
SparringEntry model — date, partner, rounds, rating 1-5, focus tags
fightCampController — create camp, milestone toggle, sparring CRUD
weightCutController — log weight, history, set target, coach alert via activityLogger
opponentDossierController — UFC DB search + Groq AI game plan (graceful fallback if no key)
Routes: /api/fight-camp, /api/weight-cut, /api/opponent-dossier
Frontend /fight-camp — countdown timer, milestones, sparring journal
Frontend /weight-cut — AreaChart with target line, daily log, alert banner
Frontend /opponent-dossier — search, stat bars, markdown game plan
Fighter dashboard: Fight Camp countdown widget + Weight Cut strip
Navbar: fighter role gets FIGHT CAMP, WEIGHT CUT, DOSSIER links

phase_3_1.name: Prediction — Explainable AI
phase_3_1.status: COMPLETE — builds clean, TypeScript zero errors
what_was_built: Feature importance bars: custom Framer Motion animated bars (replaced Recharts BarChart)
Green bars = direction:positive (favours predicted winner), Red bars = direction:negative (disadvantage overcome)
Staggered bar animation: delay 0.4 + i*0.07s, bars grow left to right
Heading: 'Why the model picked [winner name]' — dynamic, contextual
Legend: coloured dots + 'Favours [winner] / Disadvantage overcome' + 'Ensemble (LR+GBT) · N factors'
Counterfactual: standalone amber card below bars (not buried in collapsible)
Model Transparency panel: open by default, Academic badge, ensemble prose explanation
CV accuracy display fix: handles both decimal (0.707) and percent (70.7) forms
TypeScript: added direction field to topFactors in api.ts PredictionResult interface
Events page: parallel prefetch of all 3 tab counts on mount

phase_3_2.name: Coach Analytics Dashboard
phase_3_2.description: Coaches currently have zero visibility into trainees' fight camp + weight data. Build a real analytics section on the coach dashboard.

backend.logic: 1. Get active trainees: CoachRelationship.find({ coachId, status:'active' }). 2. For each trainee: a) Latest WeightLog entry + target (WeightLog.findOne({ userId: trainee._id })). b) Assignment completion %: Assignment.find({ coachId, traineeId }).count() vs completed count. c) Sparring count this week: SparringEntry.find({ userId, date >= startOfWeek }). d) Active FightCamp: FightCamp.findOne({ userId, status: active|upcoming }). 3. Return TraineeAnalytics[].
backend.return_shape: { trainees: [{ traineeId, name, role, weight: { current, target, overTarget }, assignmentCompletionPct, sparringThisWeek, fightCamp: { opponentName, fightDate, daysRemaining, milestonesCompleted, milestonesTotal } | null }] }

components_to_add: TraineeAnalyticsGrid: card per trainee — weight badge (green=on target, red=over), assignment completion % bar, sparring count this week, fight camp status chip
Recharts BarChart: one bar per trainee showing assignment completion %, color: green(>80%) amber(50-79%) red(<50%)
WeightBadge: shows current/target and diff in kg, red if over alertThreshold

phase_3_2.why_it_matters: End-to-end role data flow. Coach sees fighter's weight alert and can click → /messages to reach them. Evaluators ask 'what do coaches actually see?' — now there's a compelling data-driven answer.

phase_3_4.name: Chatbot — Full-Height Side Panel
phase_3_4.current_state: 360×580px fixed bubble. Has: markdown rendering, role-aware chips, basic history.
changes_needed: Layout: replace bubble with full-height right panel — fixed right-0 top-0 h-screen w-[420px] z-50 bg-[#111] border-l border-gray-800
Animation: Framer Motion motion.div with initial={{ x: 420 }} animate={{ x: 0 }} exit={{ x: 420 }} transition={{ type:'spring', damping:28 }}
Backdrop: when open, render <motion.div className='fixed inset-0 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm z-40' onClick={close} />
Persistence: localStorage key `chat_${user._id}` — load on mount, save on each message
Context injection: before every API call, prepend '[Role: X | Discipline: Y | Camp: active/none | Last prediction: A vs B → C wins]' to user message
Backend chatController.ts: ensure system prompt accepts userContext fields (already has framework, just verify)

phase_3_5.name: Profile — Real Prediction History
phase_3_5.current_state: Lines ~394-416 have HARDCODED fake activity: 'Edwards vs Covington — UFC 296 — 2 hours ago'
phase_3_5.fix: On mount: call predictionApi.getHistory(token). Map last 5 records to activity list with real fighter names + real timestamps via toLocaleDateString(). Show total prediction count.

known_issues_and_gotchas.mongodb_not_a_service: MongoDB is NOT installed as a Windows service. Must start mongod.exe manually each session. See CRITICAL_STARTUP_SEQUENCE above.
known_issues_and_gotchas.tailwind_v4: NEVER create tailwind.config.ts. Custom colors (octagon-red etc.) defined in globals.css @theme {} block.
known_issues_and_gotchas.activity_logger_never_throws: logActivity() is fire-and-forget. Always wrapped in try/catch in the utility itself.
known_issues_and_gotchas.conversation_dedup: buildParticipantKey() sorts two user IDs alphabetically and joins with _. Unique index on Conversation.
known_issues_and_gotchas.messaging_restriction: canMessage() in messageController checks CoachRelationship.status=active. Fans cannot message anyone.
known_issues_and_gotchas.weight_log_upsert: WeightLog has unique:true on userId. Always use findOneAndUpdate({ userId }, ..., { upsert:true }). Never Model.create() for weight logs.
known_issues_and_gotchas.fight_camp_milestones: 10 milestones auto-generated on create with evenly-spaced targetDates from now to fightDate.
known_issues_and_gotchas.prediction_confidence: confidence = Math.round(winProb * 100). Was (winProb-0.5)*200 before — that was wrong.
known_issues_and_gotchas.cv_accuracy_format: cvAccuracy may be 0.707 (decimal) or 70.7 (percent). Frontend handles both: value > 1 ? value.toFixed(1) : (value*100).toFixed(1).
known_issues_and_gotchas.prediction_no_recharts: Prediction page no longer uses Recharts for feature importance. Uses custom Framer Motion bars. Old import is commented out.
known_issues_and_gotchas.events_tab_counts: Fixed: parallel mount prefetch. Each tab uses getEvents(page:1, limit:1, status) just to get pagination.total.
known_issues_and_gotchas.useSearchParams_suspense: All pages using useSearchParams must be inside <Suspense>. Pattern in opponent-dossier/page.tsx.
known_issues_and_gotchas.no_git_worktrees: Work directly on main branch. No worktrees.
known_issues_and_gotchas.frontend_env: frontend/.env.local contains NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:5001/api — required for API calls to work.

demo_flow_for_evaluators.step_1: Register as Beginner → onboarding quiz appears → completes → PATCH /auth/profile with discipline + experienceLevel
demo_flow_for_evaluators.step_2: Register as Fighter → fighter dashboard with Fight Camp countdown widget + Weight Cut strip
demo_flow_for_evaluators.step_3: Fighter creates Fight Camp → 10 milestones auto-generated → toggle milestones complete → go to /opponent-dossier for AI game plan
demo_flow_for_evaluators.step_4: Fighter logs daily weight → /weight-cut shows area chart trend vs target
demo_flow_for_evaluators.step_5: /events → correct tab counts → click Predict on main event → prediction page auto-fills fighters
demo_flow_for_evaluators.step_6: Run prediction → animated green/red feature importance bars → amber counterfactual → Model Transparency panel showing Ensemble (LR+GBT) 8,424 fights 70.7% accuracy
demo_flow_for_evaluators.step_7: [PHASE 3.2 — BUILD NEXT] Switch to Coach → see Trainee Analytics section with weight compliance + assignment completion bars
demo_flow_for_evaluators.step_8: [PHASE 3.4] Open Chatbot → full-height right panel slides in with backdrop blur → context-aware response

next_session_instructions.step_2_read: Read D:\octagonNEW\Octagon\frontend\app\dashboard\coach\page.tsx to find where to insert the analytics section (after ConnectionHub)
next_session_instructions.step_3_read: Read D:\octagonNEW\Octagon\frontend\lib\api.ts (bottom 100 lines) to see existing api objects and add coachAnalyticsApi
efficiency_tips: Use limit on Read tool — only read the sections you need
Run npx tsc --noEmit before testing to catch type errors early
Write complete new files in one Write call rather than piecemeal Edits
Run parallel tool calls when reading multiple independent files
Do NOT re-read files already described in this snapshot
do_not: Ask clarifying questions — this context is complete
Use Model.create() for WeightLog — use findOneAndUpdate with upsert:true
next_session_instructions.after_phase_3_2_do: Phase 3.4 (Chatbot side panel), then Phase 3.5 (profile real history)
